mapper.sql: fsqtc.id, fsqtc.group_id as fsqg_id, fsqtc.table_id as fsqt_id, fsqtc.table_abbreviation, fsqtc.column_name, fsqtc.column_description, fsqtc.convert_style, fsqtc.alias, fsqtc.sort, fsqtc.enabled_flag, fsqtc.create_time, fsqtc.create_by, fsqtc.update_time, fsqtc.update_by

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_fsqg_id, ${tAlias}.table_id as ${tAlias}_fsqt_id, ${tAlias}.table_abbreviation as ${tAlias}_table_abbreviation, ${tAlias}.column_name as ${tAlias}_column_name, ${tAlias}.column_description as ${tAlias}_column_description, ${tAlias}.convert_style as ${tAlias}_convert_style, ${tAlias}.alias as ${tAlias}_alias, ${tAlias}.sort as ${tAlias}_sort, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by
mapper.insert: insert into fnd_super_query_table_column (group_id, table_id, table_abbreviation, column_name, column_description, convert_style, alias, sort, enabled_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{group.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{table.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tableAbbreviation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{columnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{columnDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{convertStyle,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{alias,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update fnd_super_query_table_column set group_id = #{group.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, table_id = #{table.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, table_abbreviation = #{tableAbbreviation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, column_name = #{columnName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, column_description = #{columnDescription,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, convert_style = #{convertStyle,jdbcType=INTEGER}, alias = #{alias,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
